'''Urrdorf City''' was the smallest of the twenty [[Space station/Legends|orbital cities]] that orbited [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. Disc-shaped, it was the lone survivor of the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Although lacking the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] of the larger cities,<ref name="CatCW" /> it was equipped with [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]] and powerful sublight engines, and escaped into interstellar space.

{{City-stub}}
